title: Viral on Instagram
description: I have recorded a lot of video demos and product launches. This is the first one that went viral: 20k views and 600 likes.

title: Local Background Remover
description: Why pay subscriptions or credits to remove the backgrounds of your images? I created Local Background Remover to fix that. Pay once, use your computer's resources, and remove hundreds or thousands of images. My first product with revenue.

title: text0
description: Cursor for writers. Vercel Hackathon winner, 2025.

title: Opencoder
description: Like Claude Code apps, but works with any model. Run opencode in the cloud.

title: Peruvian Elections 2026 Bot
description: A focused bot for following Peru's 2026 election process and checking election-related updates without digging through official sites.

title: Limon
description: Paste a Google Maps restaurant link and get a shareable landing page built from its public details, photos, contact information, and reviews.

title: Tab
description: Native autocomplete for macOS. Routine suggestions run locally, Deep Suggestions use the cloud only when requested, and every insertion stays under the user's control.

title: Build4Venezuela
description: A humanitarian hackathon and multilingual platform for builders responding to the Venezuela earthquakes. I co-organized the initiative and helped build the project platform.

title: Normal
description: A WhatsApp workflow product for teams that need versioned automations, durable runs, and a clear audit trail. Currently under active development.

title: Lupa
description: A knowledge platform for AI agents: semantic search, complete document retrieval, parsing, scheduled refreshes, versioned deployments, and analytics.
